raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan
weenu Warra Altari /
Diwidedefmits Ohlektis bi-
ja wiꞥſch garſch/ un diwidedmits
Ohlektſchu bija winna Plattums/
un defmits Ohlektſchu bija win-
na Augſtums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch lehje arridsan
weenu Juhru/ ta bija defmits
Ohlektis no weenas Mallâs lihds
ohtrai / wifeapkahrt appaka/ un
peezaſ Ohlektis bija winna Aug-
stums/un tas Mehrs wifeapkahrt
bija trihsdefmits Ohlektſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Wehrſchu Gibmi bija
appakcha apkahrt winnu/ tee
tikke wifeapkahrt to/(tahdas ma-
sas Bildes itt appakſch tahs Juh-
ras Mallas/ kas ta patt bija ka
Pohgas) darrija weenu Ohlekti/
un tikke wifeapkahrt to Juhru/
tahdu Wehrſſchu bija diwi Rin-
das leetâ Darbâ lihdsar to Juh-
ru leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta Juhra stahweja us di-
wipadefmits Wehrscheem / no
teem greesahs trihs prett See-
metapuffi/ un trihs greesahs prett
Wakkarapuffi/ un trihs greesahs
prett Deenas-Widdum/ un trihs
greesahs prett Rihteem/ un ta
Juhra btja wirſu us teem/ un
wiſſi winnu pakatas Galli bi-
ja Geekhpuffê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnas Refnums bi-
ja Plaukſtas Plattumâ/ un win-
nas Malla bija ta darrita ka
Bikkerâ Malla/ ar Pukkehm is-
taisita/ un trihs tuheſtocht Bat-
ti ſagahje eekſch tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija defmits
Katlus/ un likke peežus pa labbo,
un peežus pa kreifo Rohku/ Ma-
gatchinas pehz/ kas pee to De-
dsamo-Uppuri peederreja / to te-
tur bahse eekſcha/ bet ta Juhra
bija par to / ka tee Preester-
eekſch tahs magatoſs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan
defmits Selta Lukturus/ ka teen-
peeklahjahs buht / un likke tohs
Deewa Nammâ / peežus pee
labbas / un peežus pee kreijas
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan
defmits Galdus / un likke tohs
Deewa Nammâ / peežus pa lab-
bo/ un peežus pa kreifo Rohku.
Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan fimts
Selta Bekkenus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl darrija wiꞥſch to
Preestern Pagalmu / un to leelu
Pagalmu / ar ta Pagalmija
Wahrtim / un pahrwilke winau
Wahrtis ar Warren.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Juhru likke wiꞥſch
pa labbo Rohku Rihtapuffê
Denas-Widdum pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl darrija Urans tohs
Pohdus/ un Lahpſtas/ un Bek-
kenus. Ta pabeidse Urans to
Darbu/ ko wiꞥſch tam Kehni-
xam Salamanam Deewa
Nammâ darrija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tohs diwi Stabbus ar
teem Wehdereem/ un diwi Poh-
gahn to diweju Stabbu Wirſu/
un tahs diwi Stihpas to Pohgu
Wehderus apfegt/ kas Stabbu
Wirſu btja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
